<?php namespace Aws\S3\RegionalEndpoint; class Configuration implements ConfigurationInterface { private $endpointsType; private $isFallback; public function __construct($endpointsType, $isFallback = false) { $this->endpointsType = strtolower($endpointsType); $this->isFallback = $isFallback; if (!in_array($this->endpointsType, ['legacy', 'regional'])) { throw new \InvalidArgumentException( "Configuration parameter must either be 'legacy' or 'regional'." ); } } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getEndpointsType() { return $this->endpointsType; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function toArray() { return [ 'endpoints_type' => $this->getEndpointsType() ]; } public function isFallback() { return $this->isFallback; } }
